notes: Continues the separated edible + caution/preparation/other-use model after v4.3.167.

Normalizes a first batch of food-valid mushrooms from fused edibility_status values to simple edible status while preserving caution, preparation, expert-ID, and lookalike warnings in separate fields.
Adds/strengthens cooked-food edible_use details where the existing record already required cooking or preparation.
Moves Jewelweed from medicinal-only wording to topical/other-use-only framing; it remains visible but is not treated as food.
